seoTitle: Hillier vs Hilton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hillier and Hilton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hillier and Hilton.
heading: Hillier vs Hilton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hillier, South Australia and Hilton, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hillier has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Hilton (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hillier or Hilton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hillier has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Hilton scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hillier scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Hilton scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hillier or Hilton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hillier has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
